Zhong Jin ťćĺÁłČ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhong Jin (ťćĺÁłČ). Used a large axe but was dismounted by Zhao Yun. Zhong Jin is a fictional character. Zhong Jin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhong Jin lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
